channel.title: Brett on PowerShell.org - Welcome Automaters!
channel.description: Recent content in Brett on PowerShell.org - Welcome Automaters!

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 22-February-2019
item.description:
Topics include PoshBot, JeaDsc, Azure Pipelines, Arrays and Hashtables, and Pester testing.

Content curated by Brett Bunker, Robin Dadswell, and Mark Roloff.

Writing a PoshBot Plugin to Display TOPdesk Tickets and Assets

by Andrew Pla on February 16th

Creating bots for Teams or Slack can make you more productive and save time by not having to swtich between applications. Come let Andrew show you how to create a bot for Teams using PoshBot.

item.title: ICYMI: PowerShell Week of 1-February-2019
item.description:
Topics include Active Directory FSMO Roles, text parsing, error handling, and much more.

Content pulled together by Robin Dadswell, Mark Roloff , and Brett Bunker.

Finding Active Directory FSMO Role Holders with PowerShell

by Adam Bertram January 25

Need to find which DCs hold your FSMO roles? Adam demonstrates a quick way to find their location using PowerShell.

Parsing Text with PowerShell (3/3)

by Steve Lee [MSFT] January 28

Part 3 in the series on parsing text with PowerShell. A nice wrap up to the series with some example uses.
